rule: executives.subscription_tier must not appear in any recruiter search scoring or filter
subscription data must not enter AI candidate assessment context
subscription data must not appear in client-facing reports
subscription data must not appear in candidate presentations or slates
subscription data must not drive stage transitions or workflow automation
premium status excluded from client reports
payment data excluded from all search delivery
learning activity excluded unless explicit job-related credential
course completion excluded unless candidate-authorized and job-related
profile view counts excluded from search
psychographic data not allowed in automated selection by default
individual voluntary demographics excluded from search
individual voluntary demographics excluded from AI
unreviewed AI culture-fit/success-probability excluded from progression
